LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_TargetLang: 【Target Language】\nSet which language the AI should translate the mods into.
LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_Provider: 【AI Provider】\nSelect your AI model provider. Google (Gemini) or OpenAI are highly recommended.
LanguageData.ATC_PlzFetchModel: Please fetch the model list first
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MigrateSuccess: 📦 [System Migration] Successfully migrated {0}'s {1} to the new structure seamlessly!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SingleModDone: 🎉 Single mod translation task perfectly completed!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ProcessAbortedWithSave: 🛑 [System] Translation process safely aborted, translated content has been saved.
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_EmptyKey: Can't test without a Key, silly!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestSuccess: ✅ [Test] Success! The AI core is responding perfectly.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestFail: ❌ [Test] Failed! Please check your network or API settings.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Init: 🌐 [Init] Reading mods and building global translation cache...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_StartScan: 🚀 Auto Translation Core engaged! Target mods: {0}
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipMod: ⏩ [Skip] No Languages or Defs found. Pure code mod.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_DefScan: 🔍 [DefInjected] Deep scanning and global matching engaged...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FoundMissing: ⚙️ [{0}] Found {1} missing strings! AI is welding them now...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NoMissing: ✨ [{0}] All parts present. No welding needed.
LanguageData.ATC_CancelRequested: Stop command received. Applying emergency brakes...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FetchModelsFail: [System] Failed to fetch list. Check your API key.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NetworkRetry: [System] Network instability or AI server busy. Auto-retry triggered...
LanguageData.ATC_FirstTime_Notice: [First Use] Translation pack not enabled. Auto-reload cancelled.
LanguageData.ATC_FirstTime_Dialog:
【First Use Tip】

It looks like this is your first time translating!
The translation pack has been generated locally but isn't active yet.

Please go to RimWorld's "Mod List", find "! AutoTranslation AI Pack", 【Enable】 it, and drag it to the 【Bottom】 of your load order. Then restart the game.

After that, when you translate new mods, the changes will apply instantly without needing a restart!
LanguageData.ATC_ReloadingLog: Hot-reload in progress... The screen may flicker or freeze momentarily.
LanguageData.ATC_ReloadDoneLog: Hot-reload complete! Latest translations are now active.
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_FullText:
【Quick Start in 5 Steps】 1. Select your 【Target Language】 (V4.6 now supports reverse translation into English, Ukrainian, and Russian!) and 【AI Provider】. Google (Gemini) is recommended for its free tier. 2. Enter your 【API Key】. If using official APIs, leave the Base URL empty! 3. Click 【🔍 Fetch Model List】 and select a model from the dropdown. 4. Click the green 【🚀 Start Auto Translation】 to scan all mods, or use 【🎯 Translate Specific Mod】 for a surgical strike. You can use 【🛑 Emergency Stop】 at any time. 5. 【Crucial for First Use】 After the first run, a mod named `! AutoTranslation AI Pack` will be created. You MUST 【Enable】 it in your mod list and place it at the very bottom. Restart the game once.
【FAQ】 Q: Fetching model list fails (HTTP 401 / 403). A: Your API key is likely incorrect or has extra spaces. Also, check your account balance.
Q: HTTP 404 error occurs. A: If using official APIs, ensure the 【Custom Base URL】 is completely empty!
Q: I see "Timeout" or "Network Instability" warnings in the log. A: The AI server might be taking a nap! The mod has a robust auto-retry mechanism. If translations are still finishing, just let it be!
Q: It's been stuck for over 5 minutes. A: Press 【🛑 Emergency Stop】, restart the game, and try again. Already translated content is saved and won't consume your API quota again.
Q: Do I need to restart the game after translating? A: Only the "First Time". After that, if the translation pack is enabled, the "Hot-Reload" feature will apply changes in about 10 seconds.
Q: Where are the files located? A: In your RimWorld/Mods/!Translation_AI_Pack folder. This pack is for 【Personal Use Only】. Please do not redistribute or upload it to the Steam Workshop.
LanguageData.ATC_UpdateLog_FullText:
--- V4.6 Ultimate Update --- • Added 【English, Ukrainian, Russian】 reverse translation support! Localize your mods for the world. • Implemented 【🎯 Specific Mod Translation】 engine for surgical localized scanning. • Implemented 【🛑 Emergency Stop System】 to safely interrupt production while saving progress. • X-Ray probe upgraded to 【Level 3 Recursive Deep-Dive】 to find hidden text in any folder structure. • Completely rebuilt UI backend with dynamic window heights.
--- V4.5 Update --- • Added 【Anomalous File Report】 dual-monitor dashboard. • Implemented 【Corruption Shield】 to auto-detect and skip damaged XML files. • Added first-run guidance and anti-fail popups. • Implemented 10-second seamless hot-reload countdown.
--- V4.3 Update --- • First implementation of the 【Auto Translation Production Line】. • Built-in 【Global Translation Memory Cache】 to save API costs. • Custom Base URL support for local AI models (LM Studio, Ollama, etc.).
